name: Loop Watchdog
description: Detects unintentional agent loop interruptions and prompts the agent to resume or confirm completion. After installation, the agent must end every completed task with a stop marker ([我确认工作循环需要结束...]), otherwise the watchdog will re-inject a wake message asking the agent to resume. Installation requires three steps: (1) openclaw plugins install @abwuge/openclaw-loop-watchdog, (2) openclaw loop-watchdog setup, (3) openclaw gateway restart. See README for the full stop marker format and AGENTS.md update instructions.

watchdogDir.description: Directory to store watchdog flag files. Defaults to <workspaceDir>/watchdog.

stopMarker.description: Marker string agent must include at the end of its reply to signal intentional stop. Default: [我确认工作循环需要结束

yieldMarker.description: Marker string agent must include at the end of its reply when intentionally yielding to wait for a subagent. Suppresses wake without deleting the flag. Default: [我正在等待子代理完成
